task_completion.description: Organize bookmarks to isolate personal domains
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmark Manager showing personal domains (e.g., facebook.com, netflix.com, youtube.com) moved into a separate folder (like 'Volunteer Personal') or otherwise isolated from the main genealogy bookmarks.

task_completion.description: Add custom search engine shortcuts for genealogy sites
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome 'Manage search engines and site search' settings page showing new site search entries with keywords 'loc' (loc.gov), 'nara' (catalog.archives.gov), and 'fag' (findagrave.com).

task_completion.description: Optimize performance for large historical image files via Chrome flags
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the `chrome://flags` page showing 'Parallel downloading', 'Smooth Scrolling', and 'Back-forward cache' explicitly set to 'Enabled'.
Look for the Chrome 'Customize fonts' settings page showing the 'Font size' (default) slider set to 22 and the 'Minimum font size' slider set to 16.

task_completion.description: Enable bulk downloading without prompts to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Downloads settings page showing the Location set to '/home/ga/Documents/Archive_Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned OFF.
Look for the Chrome Password Manager settings page showing the toggle for 'Offer to save passwords' turned OFF.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser interface being navigated and modified, rather than just a terminal window editing JSON preference files.

integrity.description: The agent opened or read the specification file
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '~/Desktop/reading_room_spec.txt' being read.

integrity.description: Settings are configured in the actual browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings pages shown must be genuine Chrome internal pages (e.g., chrome://settings, chrome://flags, chrome://bookmarks) and not mocked text files or external documents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target download directory: /home/ga/Documents/Archive_Downloads. Required Chrome flags to enable: 'Parallel downloading', 'Smooth Scrolling', and 'Back-forward cache'. Custom search engines required: keyword 'loc' (loc.gov), 'nara' (catalog.archives.gov), and 'fag' (findagrave.com). Font sizes: Default font size 22, Minimum font size 16. Personal domains to isolate in bookmarks: facebook.com, pinterest.com, youtube.com, etsy.com, netflix.com, instagram.com, hulu.com, spotify.com.
